channel.title: sudo on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in sudo on IT notes

item.title: sudo SSH_CONNECTION
item.description: When using ssh, if then doing something like sudo -i the environment vars are gone, to preserve modify your sudoers (/usr/local/etc/sudoers or /usr/local/etc/sudoers.d/devops) and add something like: Defaults env_keep += "SSH_TTY SSH_CONNECTION SSH_CLIENT" In this case, it will preserve your SSH environment vars.
